requirement_topic.en: Transport compliance for lithium batteries bound to Mongolia
requirement_topic.zh: 面向蒙古运输的锂电池合规
requirement_topic.zht: 面向蒙古運輸的鋰電池合規

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks shipped for Mongolia must meet UN 38.3 dangerous goods test requirements and route documentation standards before dispatch. Mongolia is landlocked, so practical movements are predominantly rail and road logistics through border points; transport teams should ensure mode-specific packing instructions, SoTR, and documentation are complete.
summary.zh: 向蒙古运输的锂电池和移动电源必须在出货前完成UN 38.3危险品测试并具备运输文件。蒙古内陆且陆路运输为主（铁路与公路），因此应确保按运输方式使用正确包装指令、附带测试结果摘要并完整留存文件。
summary.zht: 向蒙古運輸的鋰電池和行動電源必須在出貨前完成UN 38.3危險品測試並具備運輸文件。蒙古內陸且陸路運輸為主（鐵路與公路），因此應確保按運輸方式使用正確包裝指令、附帶測試結果摘要並完整留存文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
Mode-specific dangerous-goods transport frameworks used by carriers for air, sea, and road shipments
Mongolia border-transport documentation expectations for lithium battery consignments

summary.en: China export practice already uses UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods documentation for lithium batteries. This is strongly aligned with destination requirements and usually reusable, but exporter must check exact model coverage and route-specific instructions after handover to the Mongolia logistics chain.
summary.zh: 中国出口通常使用UN 38.3及危险品运输文件用于锂电池装运。这与目标国要求有较高一致性并可复用，但在交接到蒙古物流链后仍需核对具体型号覆盖与路线要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口通常使用UN 38.3及危險品運輸文件用於鋰電池裝運。這與目標國要求有較高一致性並可複用，但在交接到蒙古物流鏈後仍需核對具體型號覆蓋與路線要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 28541-2012 and related China export logistics support standards
UN 38.3 certification and summary-of-test-results model used in outbound logistics

gap.en: The remaining gap is often execution. UN 38.3 evidence must remain current for the exact battery variant, and rail/road documentation at border points must be synchronized with Mongolia customs and importer documentation.
gap.zh: 剩余差距通常在执行层面。UN 38.3证据必须与具体型号完全对应，并且在铁路和公路边境环节与蒙古清关及进口商文件保持同步。
gap.zht: 剩餘差距通常在執行層面。UN 38.3證據必須與具體型號完全對應，並且在鐵路和公路邊境環節與蒙古清關及進口商文件保持同步。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all lithium battery and power bank logistics movements, with mandatory documentation aligned to international dangerous-goods requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Dangerous-goods testing and paperwork are generally mandatory in China export practice and remain a key base for Mongolia-bound shipments.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE), UN Manual of Tests and Criteria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep the UN 38.3 evidence model current and route-specific. For Mongolia shipments, border and importer coordination on SoTR, packaging, and class declaration is usually where failures happen.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 维持UN 38.3证据的现时性和运输方式匹配。对蒙古货物而言，边境与进口商对SoTR、包装和运输类别申报的协调最常导致不符合。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 維持UN 38.3證據的現時性與運輸方式匹配。對蒙古貨物而言，邊境與進口商對SoTR、包裝和運輸類別申報的協調最常導致不符合。
